A '''battle''' took place during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] over a [[Viidaav|mining world]] of the [[Viidaav (species)|Viidaav species]].

==The battle==
Unbeknownst to the colonists, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] ordered the detonation of the planet's [[Mine/Legends|mining charges]], as part of a plan to destroy the entire surface of the world and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces there with it. However, both the Viidaav and the Republic forces discerned the plot, and an [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] was able to terminate the automated destruct command center, thus saving the planet and the Republic's victory. By the end of the battle, only a few hundred thousand Viidaav were left alive.
